video.title: The Light of Yoga featured on Morning Sunrise on Channel 7 with Kochie

reviews.text: I've been going to Light of Yoga for over a year. With such a welcoming vibe you can relax as soon as you walk in & leave your worries at the door. SukhRaj is a great friend and a great teacher, i am grateful for his guidance during my yoga journey. With an outdoor setting we feel the breeze, the plants and see the stars, i love each session and highly recommend it to people of all levels.
reviews.name: LIZZY

reviews.text: The Light of Yoga has transformed my life completely. Raj's teaching style is unique and deeply spiritual. The outdoor garden setting creates a magical atmosphere that helps you connect with nature and yourself.
reviews.name: SARAH

reviews.text: Best yoga studio in Sydney! The combination of traditional yoga practices with modern wellness approaches makes every session special. I highly recommend trying their morning classes.
reviews.name: MICHAEL
